notes: Source: official VS-44H2 user manual via ManualsLib (66-page document), corroborated by Markertek, AV-iQ, and ConferenceTableBoxes product pages. HDMI grade is 2.0 (confirmed: HDMI 2.0b, 18Gbps/4K60 4:4:4). RS-232 is a 3-pin terminal block (euroblock), NOT a DB9 — the DB9 is found on the VS-44H2A variant. The PROG USB connector is labeled Mini-USB in the spec table; mapped to usb-micro as the closest available enum value since mini-usb is not in the list (Mini-USB = USB-B Mini, distinct from Micro-USB). Ethernet grade is eth-100m (100M) — the spec does not state Gigabit; standard Kramer matrix gear of this era uses 100M management ports. IEC C14 power inlet is inferred from the accessory listing of a detachable power cord; not explicitly stated as C14 in the manual text. No dedicated IR input port on VS-44H2 (the VS-44H2A model adds IR IN, S/PDIF outputs, balanced audio outputs, and uses a DB9 RS-232 instead).

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: 3-pin terminal block for serial device control

ports.name: PROG USB
ports.note: Mini-USB connector for firmware/device control; closest match is usb-micro — actual connector is Mini-USB (USB-B mini)

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB Type-A, 5V/2A, for powering an external device

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet inferred; unit ships with detachable power cord; 100-240V AC 50/60Hz, 22VA
